questions.subject: non_verbal
questions.body: Three views of the same cube are given. All the faces of the cube are numbered from 1 to 6. Select one figure which will result when the cube is unfolded.

solutions.solution: (C) According to the question. So, ☐ is opposite to ☐, ○ is opposite to ☐, and ☒ is opposite to ○. Clearly, only the cube in figure (a) is correct because when unfolded dice will be folded, this figure will be formed.

(b) According to the question. So, ☐ is opposite to ☒, ☐ is opposite to ○, and ☐ is opposite to ☐. Hence, only the cube in figure (b) is correct because when unfolded dice will be folded, only this figure will be formed.
(b) As per the question. So, ○ is opposite to ☐, ± is opposite to ☐, and ♦ is opposite to ◇. Hence, option (b) will be the correct answer.
(b) According to the question. So, two blank faces are opposite to each other
(c) According to the question. So, ☐ is opposite to ○, ☐ is opposite to ○, and × is opposite to ※. Now, it is clear that only option (d) shows the correct figure of unfolded dice.
(c) According to the question. So, two blank faces of cube are opposite to two another blank faces, and × is opposite to ☒. Clearly, only option (c) is the correct answer.
(b) According to the question. So, A is opposite to D, B is opposite to F, and C is opposite to E. Hence, only the cube in figure (b) is the correct answer.
